Question 1 of 7

Let's Calibrate the Slider

A few quick questions to get you an accurate quote.

How many stories is your home?

Screens

Window screens will need to be removed and replaced during cleaning.

Do you have screens?

Screens

This helps us know how to plan for screen removal.

Are they removed from inside or outside?

A $50 charge will be removed from your onsite invoice if screens are removable from the outside.

Window Type

French pane windows have multiple small panes divided by grids or muntins — cleaned on the outside of the glass.

Do you have French pane windows?

Window Type

Are more than 75% of your windows French pane?

Cleaning History

This helps us know what to expect when we arrive.

How often are your windows cleaned?

Your Neighborhood

Some historic homes have special window types that can affect pricing.

Is your home in a historic neighborhood?

Storm Windows

Storm windows are a secondary window installed over the original for insulation.

Do you have storm windows?

Anything Unusual?

These features can affect access and pricing.

Do you have clerestory windows, skylights, or other less common features?

Which ones?

Select all that apply.

High windows set along the upper walls, above eye level — usually require extended pole access.
Frameless glass panels used as railings on decks, stairs, or balconies.
Windows set into the roofline — cleaned from the roof surface.
Large floor-to-ceiling glass panels, common on modern or commercial-style buildings.
A fully enclosed glass room or porch with windows on multiple sides.
Something else unusual — we'll take a look and quote on-site.

All items can be priced on-site.

Calibrating Suds

All set! Use the slider to explore your estimate.

Storm Windows — You're in the Right Place

We specialize in storm windows across historic and other neighborhoods. Our Storm Package covers both layers of glass and the space between — and when most windows have storms, the additional surfaces are typically included.

Final pricing and scheduling are confirmed in person.

Let's Talk In Person

Historic homes take an in-person estimate so we can give you an accurate quote.

We'd love to see your home firsthand — reach out and we'll get you on the schedule.

Disclaimers

  • • A $25 deposit is required to secure your booking and will be applied toward your final invoice.
  • • We reserve the right to refuse or discontinue service at our discretion, including for safety, access, or property conditions encountered on-site. Your deposit will be refunded in full if we refuse or are unable to complete service.
  • • Cancellations or no-shows within 24 hours of your scheduled appointment may forfeit the deposit.
  • • Remaining balance is due upon completion of service.
